title: Ghana's SEC Grants 11 Companies Access to Cryptocurrency Regulatory Sandbox
message_html: Ghana's SEC Grants 11 Companies Access to Cryptocurrency Regulatory Sandbox ...
snippet: CoinDesk (@CoinDesk): LATEST: Ghana’s Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) said 11 companies have been granted access to a regulatory sandbox to test cryptocurrency and digital asset services under the country’s Virtual Asset Service Providers Act.
